title: Perform formula on multiple mirrored columns
excerpt: Need the ability to perform a formula on multiple mirrored column. There are many instances where mirrored columns are used and we need the ability to perform basic operations on these columns

posts.author: arnoldprasad (Arnold P)
posts.cookedHtml: Need the ability to perform a formula on multiple mirrored column. There are many instances where mirrored columns are used and we need the ability to perform basic operations on these columns

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @arnoldprasad !

One “trick” that might seem useful to you is using a formula column to simply reflect the result of a mirrored column, and by using that formula column you should be able to perform the operations you need to.

Let me know if this helps!

Best Regards,
Giannis, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: arnoldprasad (Arnold P)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks. That is a great work around I’ve been using. The only issue is that we may want to hide that column (as it’s redundant to the user), the column can’t be used in a formula.
